UNLIKE the 1-story sister houses (where this identical sentence is boilerplate that literally mismatches a 1-story building), THIS house genuinely IS 2-story, so the 'ชั้น 2' reference here is actually a correct, literal statement of scope, not a template leftover., Content and structure otherwise closely mirrors the 1-story sister houses' A-01 material list (same categories, same item numbering FB1/CB1/R1), consistent with all three being variants from the same government housing-program document template — cross-confirms the reading., Item 2 (พื้นปูไม้ปาร์เก้ [พื้นชั้น 1 ห้องนอน]) still says 'พื้นชั้น 1' even though this house's floor plan (หน้า06/หน้า07) shows all 3 bedrooms (นอน1/นอน2/นอน3) are on ชั้น 2, not ชั้น 1 — flagged as a likely uncorrected template carryover from the 1-story sister designs (where bedrooms were on the single ground floor), not verified/resolved here.

Source PNG contains two portrait sheets side by side rotated 90 degrees; confirmed empirically (re-verified with a programmatic 90-degree-counter-clockwise rotation + crop, not just visual estimation) that rotating COUNTER-CLOCKWISE makes the text read normally, and after that rotation the physical RIGHT half of the original landscape image becomes the TOP block (this sheet, 1/22) while the physical LEFT half becomes the BOTTOM block (sheet 2/22, extracted separately as _2.json) - same convention as houses 01 and 02., This is the ฐานรากแผ่ (spread footing) BOQ variant, 2-story house, 'แบบที่ 3' - distinct from house 01 (also ฐานรากแผ่ but 'แบบที่ 1', single story, 19-sheet book) and house 02 (ฐานรากเสาเข็ม pile variant of แบบที่ 1). Confirmed by the printed title block text 'บ้านครอบครัวไทยร่วมสมัย แบบที่ 3 (ฐานรากแผ่ ไม่มีระบบปรับอากาศ)' and drawing numbers 'S 58144, AR58003, SN-58080, EE58079'., Issuing agency printed on this header block is 'กองมาตรฐานราคากลาง กรมโยธาธิการและผังเมือง' (Department of Public Works and Town & Country Planning) - this differs from house 01/02's header which read 'กองมาตรฐานราคากลาง กรมบัญชีกลาง กระทรวงการคลัง' (Comptroller General's Department, Ministry of Finance). Transcribed exactly as printed on this house's own sheet, not copied from another house., All quantity and price cells on this cover sheet are blank in the original document - only category labels and the 'รวม' unit placeholder are printed for items 1-4, matching the pattern seen on houses 01/02's equivalent cover sheets. Item 5 and the final total row have no unit placeholder printed at all., doc_page=62 read directly from a clear, unambiguous printed page-number crop at the bottom-center of the raw (unrotated) source PNG page 64 - not inferred. This anchors the doc_page = png_page - 2 relationship used across this whole 64-74 batch, independently re-confirmed by also directly reading doc_page=66 on png page 68 and doc_page=72 on png page 74 (both unambiguous).
